creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Thank you for your submission. There are couple things that need to be 
fixed before this could be commited to ports repo: 

1) Port don't record files it installs (pkg-plist is empty) 2) Global 
CFLAGS is not respected, -g compiler flags is 
used during compilation while WITH_DEBUG is off 
3) Port installs documentation files in ${PREFIX}/doc, while 
it should be ${DOCSDIR} 

Build log: 
http://people.freebsd.org/~pawel/buildlogs/thrulay-hd-0.6.4.log
